rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Plaintiffs Application For Order For Sale Of Dwelling And Order To Show Cause Why Such Sale Should Not Be Ordered - Pos Attached

rulings.Case Title: OREGON MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY VS. BRUCE I. GILBERT ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Plaintiff Oregon Mutual Insurance Company For Reconsideration Of Order Sustaining Sunset Scavenger Company'S Demurrer To Plaintiff'S Second Amended Complaint; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday May 15, 2018, line 2. PLAINTIFF OREGON MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Plaintiff Oregon Mutual Insurance Company For Reconsideration Of Order Sustaining Sunset Scavenger Company'S Demurrer To Plaintiff'S Second Amended Complaint GRANTED. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to negligence cause of action to add newly discovered facts. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RHUSHANTHA WANIGATUNGA ET AL VS. C. SOPHIE HAN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Allow The Filing Of A Response To The Verified Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday May 15, 2018, line 3. DEFENDANT C. SOPHIE HAN, SS DREAMBUILDERS, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Allow The Filing Of A Response To The Verified Amended Complaint GRANTED based on mandatory provisions of CCP 473(b) for counsel mistake, surprise, and neglect. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KUNAL MALHOTRA ET AL VS. STEWART TITLE OF CALIFORNIA INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Pacific Union International, Inc., Jason Hoffman'S Demurrer To 1st Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday May 15, 2018, line 4. Defendants Pacific Union International, Inc., Jason Hoffman'S Demurrer To 1st Amended Complaint SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege each element of breach of contract cause of action, including the terms of the contract (or attach a copy); whether Plaintiff complied with its obligations, whether contract is written or oral, etc. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KUNAL MALHOTRA ET AL VS. STEWART TITLE OF CALIFORNIA INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Stewart Title Of California, Inc.'S Joinder Of Defendant Stca Inc In Defendants Pacific Union International Inc And Jason Hoffman'S Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Amended Complaint For Damages
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday May 15, 2018, line 4. Defendant Stewart Title Of California, Inc.'S Joinder Of Defendant Stca Inc In Defendants Pacific Union International Inc And Jason Hoffman'S Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Amended Complaint For Damages GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is granted as to request for attorney's fees incurred in prosecution of this action; no contractual or statutory basis for recovery. Motion is otherwise denied. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KUNAL MALHOTRA ET AL VS. STEWART TITLE OF CALIFORNIA INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Pacific Union International, Inc., Jason Hoffman'S Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Amended Complaint For Damages
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday May 15, 2018, line 4. Defendants Pacific Union International, Inc., Jason Hoffman'S Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Amended Complaint For Damages GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is granted as to request for attorney's fees incurred in prosecution of this action; no contractual or statutory basis for recovery. Motion is otherwise denied. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID LOPEZ VS. THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Special Motion To Strike By Defendant The John Stewart Company And Request For Attorney Fees
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday May 15, 2018, line 5. DEFENDANT THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY Notice Of Special Motion To Strike By Defendant The John Stewart Company And Request For Attorney Fees DENIED. Moving party failed to sustain its burden and show that any claim in Plaintiff's complaint arises out of protected activity. This action is based on a non-protected activity of "lock out," not on persecution of previously dismissed unlawful detainer action or on entering into a settlement agreement. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: QIANG WU VS. JESSICA BAYZE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday May 15, 2018, line 6. DEFENDANT JESSICA BAYZE DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges existence of landlord-tenant relationship an all elements of each cause of action. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SHIRLEY YANHUA YU VS. FRANCISCO PLEITEZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday May 15, 2018, line 7. DEFENDANT FRANCISCO PLEITEZ, MARIA PLEITEZ DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to (1) reconcile assertions regarding the date of service of the Notice - Proof of Service vs. Complaint; and to (2) allege the means by which Defendants have been informed of the exact date of termination of tenancy. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DIPAK GANDHI VS. MARON HASEGAWA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION / Notice Of Motion, Motion, Memorandum Of Points & Authorities And Declaration In Supoprt Of Motion To Vacate Default And Judgment; Proposed Response; And Proposed Response
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday May 15, 2018, line 8. DEFENDANT MARON HASEGAWA MOTION / Notice Of Motion and Motion To Vacate Default And Judgment DENIED. Defendant fails to meet burden under CCP 473(b). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MANCHEUK SO VS. MICHAEL KINSELLA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday May 15, 2018, line 9. DEFENDANT MICHAEL KINSELLA DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OFF Calendar, First Amended Complaint on file. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DIPAK GANDHI VS. YOBANI PRADO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion, Motion, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities, And Declaration In Support Of Motion To Vacate Default And Judgment; Proposed Response; Proposed Order
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday May 15, 2018, line 11. DEFENDANT YOBANI PRADO Notice Of Motion and Motion To Vacate Default And Judgment GRANTED, subject to (1) defendant posting $1,400 with the Court no later than May 15, 2018 by 4:00 p.m.; and thereafter (2) filing an answer no later than 4:00 p.m. on May 15, 2018. = (501/REQ)
